description: For the woman of substance, here's a pair of sandals to match your disposition. In pink and grey, lotto's Virtue sandals, look wonderful with jeans. Wear it with a bright tee. Upper Foam midfoot, forefoot and ankle straps with aggressive contrast twill tape stitch detailing for durability Four criss-cross forefoot straps attached to the footbed Velcro adjustable fastening on the ankle and the forefoot straps Cushioned rubber footbed for maximum comfort Arched footbed for ergonomic Fit Abstract print for style Outsole TPU rubber outsole with multi directional lugs and brand name to double up for grip and traction Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
